name: thoughtspot-mcp
description: MCP Server for ThoughtSpot - provides OAuth authentication and tools for querying data.

metadata.short_description: Query and analyze data with ThoughtSpot's AI-powered analytics
metadata.mesh_description: Provides OAuth authentication and tools for querying data in ThoughtSpot. It enables secure access to ThoughtSpot's AI-powered analytics platform. Query data using natural language, build interactive visualizations, and generate insights from your data warehouse. Perfect for business analysts and data teams seeking AI-powered self-service analytics.
